$comment: Brand-specific operational learnings. APPEND-ONLY — never delete or edit existing entries. Mark status to indicate relevance. Use capture-learning skill for fast appends.

_rules.to_archive: Set status to 'obsolete' or 'closed-wontretry'. Never remove the entry.
_rules.quick_add: Use capture-learning skill: 'capture ce learning pour [brand] : [fait]'

_notes.entries[].scope: brand | platform | workspace — détermine où le learning s'applique
_notes.entries[].type: workaround | compliance | behavior | api_rule — détermine comment l'agent l'utilise
_notes.entries[].platform: meta | shopify | google | ga4 | klaviyo | etc — requis si scope=platform
_notes.entries[].genericity: brand | sector | universal — portée du learning
